result.stdout:
USAGE:
    resxporter.dll [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    export     
    import

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    resxporter.dll [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    export     
    import

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    resxporter.dll export [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                        Prints help information                   
    -p, --path <PATH>                 Path to the directory containing the .resx
                                      files                                     
    -f, --file <FILE>                 List of .resx files to export             
    -e, --exporter <FORMAT>           The exporters to be used to process the   
                                      resx files                                
    -a, --exporter-arg <KEY=VALUE>    Additional arguments for the selected     
                                      exporter (FORMAT:key=value)               
        --only-missing                Export only keys that have at least one   
                                      missing translation                       
        --copy-translations           If enabled, copy missing translations from
                                      other keys with the same default culture  
                                      value

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    resxporter.dll export [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                        Prints help information                   
    -p, --path <PATH>                 Path to the directory containing the .resx
                                      files                                     
    -f, --file <FILE>                 List of .resx files to export             
    -e, --exporter <FORMAT>           The exporters to be used to process the   
                                      resx files                                
    -a, --exporter-arg <KEY=VALUE>    Additional arguments for the selected     
                                      exporter (FORMAT:key=value)               
        --only-missing                Export only keys that have at least one   
                                      missing translation                       
        --copy-translations           If enabled, copy missing translations from
                                      other keys with the same default culture  
                                      value

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    resxporter.dll import [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                      Prints help information                     
    -p, --path <PATH>               Path to the directory containing the        
                                    resource files                              
    -l, --loader <LOADER>           The type of the loader to use               
        --update-existing           Update existing translations                
    -a, --loader-arg <KEY=VALUE>    Additional arguments for the selected loader
                                    (key=value)

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    resxporter.dll import [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                      Prints help information                     
    -p, --path <PATH>               Path to the directory containing the        
                                    resource files                              
    -l, --loader <LOADER>           The type of the loader to use               
        --update-existing           Update existing translations                
    -a, --loader-arg <KEY=VALUE>    Additional arguments for the selected loader
                                    (key=value)
